theme: Profile identity & quick wins — the three highest-leverage, lowest-effort profile-believability fixes so a logged-in hero (Maya Chen on demo-3) shows the RIGHT org name, a REAL role+title, and a REAL face. G1 org name: thread st.Org.Name/slug through the seeder roster (RosterIdentity/BuildRoster) -> clerkenstein (RosterEntry -> DemoUser -> orgMemberships) so the FAPI org resource carries the story org name (top bar reads 'Cervato Systems', not 'Clerkenstein Demo Org'); a DisallowUnknownFields paired struct change with a no-roster default fallback. G2 role backfill: backfill public.user_basic_info (job_role_id + job_title + summary + location — the table the /profile header actually reads, NOT memberships) from the resolved hero role via an idempotent IS-DISTINCT-FROM-guarded UPDATE; one UPDATE lights the header AND the role-gap/role-readiness widgets. G4 real-face avatars: replace the DiceBear initials HTTP URL with a self-authored parametric SVG face generator emitted as an offline base64 data URI (deterministic by uuid, license-clean, ~1 KB). Tooling + docs only — zero platform-repo edits.
